channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Officer involved in Henry Nowak case resigns after Starmer says he ‘felt sick’ watching bodycam footage
item.description: Politics latest: Officer involved in Henry Nowak case resigns after Starmer says he ‘felt sick’ watching bodycam footage

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham could introduce 10-year plan to nationalise ‘broken’ water industry
item.description: Andy Burnham could introduce 10-year plan to nationalise ‘broken’ water industry

item.title: FT UK Politics: Kyle included ‘more positive language’ in AI speech after Mandelson advice
item.description: Kyle included ‘more positive language’ in AI speech after Mandelson advice

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer uses disappearing messages, admits Downing Street
item.description: Starmer uses disappearing messages, admits Downing Street

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer uses disappearing messages on WhatsApp, No 10 admits after Mandelson files released
item.description: Starmer uses disappearing messages on WhatsApp, No 10 admits after Mandelson files released

item.title: i Politics: Starmer and Reeves 'disappearing' Mandelson texts sparking Cabinet resentment
item.description: Starmer and Reeves 'disappearing' Mandelson texts sparking Cabinet resentment

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer defends using vanishing WhatsApp messages after Mandelson files revelation
item.description: Starmer defends using vanishing WhatsApp messages after Mandelson files revelation

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer says he ‘felt sick’ watching video of Henry Nowak’s arrest – as it happened
item.description: Starmer says he ‘felt sick’ watching video of Henry Nowak’s arrest – as it happened

item.title: The Guardian: Streeting says raising concerns over Gaza in government like ‘hitting up against a brick wall’ - The Guardian
item.description: Streeting says raising concerns over Gaza in government like ‘hitting up against a brick wall’ - The Guardian

item.title: The Guardian: No 10 confirms Starmer’s WhatsApp messages automatically delete - The Guardian
item.description: No 10 confirms Starmer’s WhatsApp messages automatically delete - The Guardian
